positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of cosmic wandering. A solitary, sleek, crescent moon floats gently among scattered nebula clouds in deep indigo and sapphire hues. Floating particles of bioluminescent stardust give the impression of movement. The overall composition should be centered, with the moon acting as the primary subject, contrasted against a deep, velvety black void. Style: Intricate linework mixed with soft gradient watercolor washes. Composition: Centralized, balanced symmetry. Lighting: High contrast, directional glow emanating from the nebula. Color direction: Limited palette focusing on deep blues, purples, and silver accents. Perfect for screen printing on dark fabric.
negative: text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, out of frame, extra limbs, low contrast, poor anatomy, noise, jpeg artifacts, messy, dirty, cluttered, photorealism
